raw_title: SEC Announces 45th Annual Small Business Forum to Improve Capital-Raising Policy
raw_content: The Securities and Exchange Commission will host the agency’s 45th Annual Government Business Forum on Small Business Capital Formation at SEC headquarters in Washington, D.C., on March 9 from 1 p.m. to 5 p.m. ET. The event will be webcast live. …
generated_title: SEC举办第45届小企业资本形成年度论坛
generated_summary: 美国证交会将于3月9日在华盛顿总部举办年度小企业融资论坛，讨论资本募集政策改进，网络同步直播。
